response.original_title: 🧭 What is the Kraken 72-hour rule? Security Delay Explained
response.overview: The What is the Kraken 72-hour rule? on Kraken 🔐 refers to a security hold applied after sensitive account changes. 1 🧬🔥888🔥633🔥4176 When you reset passwords or update withdrawal settings, Kraken temporarily locks withdrawals for 72 hours to prevent unauthorized access and protect your funds from potential fraud or hacking. 1 🚀💫888💫633💫4176
